issues.reason: The west-side and northwest pocket cells reconnect the southwest entrance area to the north gallery, so they behave as an extra macro route rather than a simple reward pocket. This is non-blocking because the map still has controlled corridor structure and can be gated or costed later.
issues.required_change: No mandatory topology repair. If later stages need exactly three route options, seal or gate one connector such as [4,3] or [1,8] so the west side becomes a true optional pocket.

required_changes: No mandatory topology repair. If later stages need exactly three route options, seal or gate one connector such as [4,3] or [1,8] so the west side becomes a true optional pocket.
summary: Local topology review passed. | Topology passes: MT0 is 13x13, uses only 0/1/87/88 in floor.map, has one downFloor at [1,11] and one upFloor at [11,1], entrance reaches exit, wall ratio is 0.538, and the structure supports meaningful candidate routing without single-corridor or open-grid failure.
